title: achyranthes totonaca
intro: Achyranthes totonaca is a plant species in the Amaranthaceae family, also known as the "Mexican tea" or "blood flower." The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Achyranthes totonaca include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Achyranthes totonaca can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
